summary: Adds Peloton-local managed OAuth bootstrap, private bundle reuse and refresh, strict catalog authentication, and bounded MCP failure handling.
reason: The generated bearer-token contract required a user-supplied secret and could be shadowed by stale authorization state; Peloton needs unattended lifecycle ownership without a generic credential platform. The bounded MCP guard prevents oversized provider failure responses without changing provider behavior.
validated_outcome: Focused OAuth, bounded MCP endpoint-error and shellout tests, offline tests, vet, build, strict catalog guard, command help, and official force regeneration preserve the managed lifecycle and offline command.
